allow: Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/data/items/weapons/weapons.js''\).then\(m => { const w = m.activeWeapons.filter\(w => w.tier <= 2\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(w.map\(x => \({id: x.id, name: x.name, family: x.family, tier: x.tier}\)\), null, 2\)\) }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/data/items/weapons/weapons.js''\).then\(m => { const ids = [''staff'',''quarterstaff'',''umbrella'',''jitte'',''gloves'',''chargedGloves'',''taser'']; const w = m.activeWeapons.filter\(w => ids.includes\(w.id\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(w.map\(x => \({id: x.id, name: x.name, family: x.family, tier: x.tier, description: x.description}\)\), null, 2\)\) }\)")
